actionUnits.condition: PhoneRingScreen (MonoBehaviour id 1633495861, m_Script guid 036aa4c6ab8e55144a03e8aefc6e9cca) is attached to Phone_Blue and matches the provided script. calling_material is assigned (guid 8669b00696550574cb2f5a0480bbc344). This script swaps the Renderer.material to calling_material while AudioSource.isPlaying, else reverts to the original material. No public no-parameter methods or UnityEvents (m_Calls) are exposed in scene to invoke manually.
